Part.Source:
&sdtConciliacaoMaquininha = dpConMaqPendente(&EmpCod,&BanCarCod,&dataDia,&dataMes,&dataAno,&qtdItensLoad)
for &sdtConciliacaoMaquininhaItem in &sdtConciliacaoMaquininha for each where EmpCod = &EmpCod where FilCod = &FilCod where CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOC or CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOD where CreCarNroAut = &sdtConciliacaoMaquininhaItem.LanMaqNroAut when not &sdtConciliacaoMaquininhaItem.LanMaqNroAut.IsEmpty() where CreCarNroNsu = &sdtConciliacaoMaquininhaItem.LanMaqNSU when not &sdtConciliacaoMaquininhaItem.LanMaqNSU.IsEmpty() where CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA Where CreVlrDup >= &sdtConciliacaoMaquininhaItem.LanMaqVlrVenda - 1 Where CreVlrDup <= &sdtConciliacaoMaquininhaItem.LanMaqVlrVenda + 1 where CreDtaVct <= &sdtConciliacaoMaquininhaItem.LanMaqDtaPgto where CreCarBanCod = &BanCarCod where CreVlrSdo > 0
&sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem = new() &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreCliCod = CreCliCod &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreCliRaz = CreCliRaz &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreCliCodRaz = CreCliCodRaz &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreDtaVct = CreDtaVct &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreDtaEms = CreDtaEms &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CrePlanCod = CrePlanCod &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreCarCreDeb = CreCarCreDeb &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreCarBanNom = CreCarBanNom &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreCarCardNom = CreCarCardNom &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreDupNro = CreDupNro &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreVlrDup = CreVlrDup &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreCarNroAut = CreCarNroAut &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreCarNroNsu = CreCarNroNsu &sdtConciliacaoMaquininhaItem.Duplicatas.Add(&sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem)
when none for each where EmpCod = &EmpCod where FilCod = &FilCod where CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOC or CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOD where CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA Where CreVlrDup >= &sdtConciliacaoMaquininhaItem.LanMaqVlrVenda - 1 Where CreVlrDup <= &sdtConciliacaoMaquininhaItem.LanMaqVlrVenda + 1 where CreDtaVct <= &sdtConciliacaoMaquininhaItem.LanMaqDtaPgto where CreCarBanCod = &BanCarCod where CreVlrSdo > 0
&sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem = new() &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreCliCod = CreCliCod &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreCliRaz = CreCliRaz &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreCliCodRaz = CreCliCodRaz &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreDtaVct = CreDtaVct &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreDtaEms = CreDtaEms &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CrePlanCod = CrePlanCod &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreCarCreDeb = CreCarCreDeb &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreCarBanNom = CreCarBanNom &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreCarCardNom = CreCarCardNom &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreDupNro = CreDupNro &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreVlrDup = CreVlrDup &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreCarNroAut = CreCarNroAut &sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem.CreCarNroNsu = CreCarNroNsu &sdtConciliacaoMaquininhaItem.Duplicatas.Add(&sdtDuplicataMaquininhaItem)
endfor endfor endfor
parm(in:&EmpCod, in:&FilCod, in:&BanCarCod, in:&dataDia, in:&dataMes, in:&dataAno, in:&qtdItensLoad, out:&sdtConciliacaoMaquininha);
